mission: Identify access path + design Phi measurement protocol on commercial photonic AI compute (Lightmatter / Lightelligence / Q.ANT / NTT). Honest C3: substrate-mismatch, IIT designed for discrete-state systems, photonic is continuous-amplitude.

in_scope: classical analog photonic AI compute (Lightmatter Envise, Lightelligence PACE 2, Q.ANT NPU 2, NTT IOWN/PEC-2)
P-A weak path Phi measurement (digital ADC readout vector via anima_phi_v3)
out_of_scope: photonic-quantum vendors (PsiQuantum, Xanadu, ORCA, Quandela) -- N-12 axis
continuous-state IIT generalization (P-C path, methodology gap)
vendor direct contact / account creation (mission constraint)
NTT IOWN datacenter switch direct measurement (hyperscaler-only)

top3_ranking.justification: PCIe standard card + ONNX/PyTorch/TVM/OpenCL stack -- most standardized SDK, 44 paying customers (early 2026), HK IPO 600x oversub, ONNX hidden-state hook likely feasible
TFLNoI native analog, C/C++/Python PCIe API (highest direct programmability), 2026-Q1 shipments, Leibniz LRZ first install (institutional access path), nonlinear enhanced

Largest funding ($4.4B, $850M total), Nature 2025 light-speed matmul paper (academic credibility), but 4U blade only, no single dev kit, early-access partnership required (cloud API absence is decisive blocker)

excluded_vendor.reason: Datacenter switch / hyperscaler-only, no direct anima user access path

methodology_gap.iit_substrate_postulate: discrete state-set with TPM (transition probability matrix)
methodology_gap.photonic_native_representation: continuous-amplitude optical field (E in C), interferometric phase + intensity
methodology_gap.ontology_mismatch_verdict: IIT discrete-state postulate vs photonic continuous-amplitude is fundamental mismatch -- no published bridge methodology exists

P_A_weak_sound.description: Digital ADC readout vector -> anima_phi_v3 sample-partition cov-logdet
P_A_weak_sound.verdict: SELECTED for D+? trial (vendor partnership prerequisite)

P_B_partial_sound_future.description: Interferometric output amplitude vector (I_k = |E_k|^2) -> Gaussian Phi_G surrogate (Barrett-Seth 2011)
P_B_partial_sound_future.feasibility: MID (vendor instrumentation dependent, requires raw photodetector access)
P_B_partial_sound_future.verdict: future work, vendor partnership prerequisite, currently all 4 vendors black-box

P_C_handwave_rejected.feasibility: NONE (methodology does not exist in published literature)
P_C_handwave_rejected.verdict: EXPLICITLY NOT_ATTEMPTED -- handwave path rejected per raw#10

d0_protocol_steps_p_a: 1. Lock 16-prompt fixture (anima_phi_v3 PROMPTS, shared with N-3)
2. Reference: GPU CLM-tiny 170M hidden state forward (reuse N-3 result)
4. Photonic chip forward (16 prompts) -> hidden-state dump H_phot
5. Phi* compute on H_phot via tool/anima_phi_v3_canonical.hexa
6. Pearson r(Phi_k_gpu, Phi_k_phot) over K=8 partitions
new_hexa_tools_required_at_partnership: tool/n13_phi_phot_corr.hexa (Pearson r + verdict gate, mac-local OK)

f1_weight_n13.post_methodology_projection: 0.30-0.50 if continuous-state IIT methodology established + 3-vendor cross

sound: Literature gap explicitly verified (0 published refs IIT-Phi x photonic)
P-A weak path uses substrate-agnostic anima_phi_v3 (representation-level)
5 falsifier predicates pre-registered with null floor (PRED-4)
hand_wave: IIT-Phi on photonic methodology is 0-published (literature absolute gap)
All 4 vendors lack cloud API (partnership or hardware purchase mandatory)
ONNX hidden-state hook feasibility unverified per vendor
Photonic ADC readout quantization noise asymmetric vs GPU bf16
Vendor compiler layer fusion may shift hidden-state hook position
Vendor pricing undisclosed (PCIe card / NPS server)
N-13 weight 0.016 currently -- methodology immature direct consequence
Photonic-quantum vendors partial axis overlap with N-12 (resolved by scope split)
explicitly_not_in_scope: Continuous-state IIT generalization formalism (P-C, awaits academic methodology)
IOWN datacenter switch measurement (no user access)
Phi_G photonic applicability mathematical proof (separate work)

blockers_summary: Vendor partnership / cloud API or PCIe card access (all 4 vendors lack public cloud API)
Photonic-IIT measurement methodology absent in published literature (0 refs)
Vendor compiler hidden-state hook feasibility unverified
$0 budget mission constraint vs vendor hardware/partnership cost
Pricing undisclosed for Lightelligence PACE 2 / Q.ANT NPS
